hooks.command: PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"PostToolUse"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"Stop"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"PreCompact"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"SubagentStart"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PORT=$(cat .tenet/context-hub.port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://localhost:$PORT/api/hooks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"event":"SubagentStop"}' --connect-timeout 2 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
